news.t: VanEck Launches Constant Maturity Commodity Strategy ETF (CMCI)

overview.description: The VanEck CMCI Commodity Strategy ETF (CMCI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the UBS Constant Maturity Commodity index. The fund tracks a broad index that represents the five commodity sectors: agriculture, energy, livestock, precious metals, and industrial metals. The index aims to provide beta exposure across 29 commodity components and maturities. CMCI was launched on Aug 21, 2023 and is issued by VanEck.

holdings.n: VanEck CM Commodity Index Fund Class A

data.title: VanEck Launches Constant Maturity Commodity Strategy ETF (CMCI)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck launches CMCI ETF, brings “constant maturity” approach to the U.S. commodity ETF category for the first time.
